name: Cheese-Tomato Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients just until well-combined and no longer dry. Add more milk if necessary.
2. Pre-heat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. Lightly oil an 8x8x2-inch pan.
4. Spread the batter in the pan and bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until the top is golden and springs back when touched.
